children.name: Lipkea
children.description: Lipkea — a genus of lipkeid stalked jellyfish in the family Lipkeidae.

children.name: Lipkea ruspoliana
children.description: Lipkea ruspoliana — a species in the genus Lipkea, family Lipkeidae. Also known as lipkeid stalked jellyfish.

children.name: Lipkea stephensoni
children.description: Lipkea stephensoni — a species in the genus Lipkea, family Lipkeidae. Also known as lipkeid stalked jellyfish.

children.name: Lipkea sturdzi
children.description: Lipkea sturdzi — a species in the genus Lipkea, family Lipkeidae. Also known as lipkeid stalked jellyfish.
